verses.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਗੁਰਏ ਨਮਹ ॥ ਜੁਗਾਦਿ ਗੁਰਏ ਨਮਹ ॥ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਏ ਨਮਹ ॥ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਗੁਰਦੇਵਏ ਨਮਹ ॥
verses.hindi: आदि गुरए नमह ॥ जुगादि गुरए नमह ॥ सतिगुरए नमह ॥ श्री गुरदेवए नमह ॥
verses.english: I bow to the Primal Guru. I bow to the Guru of the Ages. I bow to the True Guru. I bow to the Great Divine Guru.
verses.translation: I bow to the Primal Guru. I bow to the Guru of the Ages. I bow to the True Guru. I bow to the Divine Guru.

verses.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਉ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਉ ॥ ਕਲਿ ਕਲੇਸ ਤਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਮਿਟਾਵਉ ॥
verses.hindi: सिमरउ सिमरि सिमरि सुखु पावउ ॥ कलि कलेस तन माहि मिटावउ ॥
verses.english: Meditating, meditating in remembrance, I find peace. The pains and troubles of the body are erased.
verses.translation: Meditating, meditating in remembrance, I attain peace. The sufferings and afflictions of the body are erased.

verses.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਉ ਜਾਸੁ ਬਿਸੁੰਭਰ ਏਕੈ ॥ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਅਗਨਿਤ ਅਨੇਕੈ ॥
verses.hindi: सिमरउ जासु बिसुंभर एकै ॥ नामु जपत अगनित अनेकै ॥
verses.english: I meditate in remembrance on the One, the Universal Sustainer. Countless multitudes chant His Name.
verses.translation: Meditate on the One Universal Sustainer. Countless people chant His Name.

verses.gurmukhi: ਬੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਨ ਸਿੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਸੁਧਾਖ੍ਯ੍ਯਰ ॥ ਕੀਨੇ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਇਕ ਆਖ੍ਯ੍ਯਰ ॥
verses.hindi: बेद पुरान सिंम्रिति सुधाख्यर ॥ कीने राम नाम इक आख्यर ॥
verses.english: The Vedas, Puraanas and Simritees, the purest of utterances, were created from the One Word of the Lord's Name.
verses.translation: The Vedas, Puraanas and Simritees are the nectar; they were created from the one Word of God.

verses.gurmukhi: ਕਿਨਕਾ ਏਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਜੀਅ ਬਸਾਵੈ ॥ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਗਨੀ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
verses.hindi: किनका एक जिसु जीअ बसावै ॥ ता की महिमा गनी न आवै ॥
verses.english: One who enshrines even a tiny bit of it in the mind — his glory cannot be measured.
verses.translation: One who enshrines even a particle of it in their mind — their glory cannot be counted.
